heading: Work schedules
notDeployed: The "Work schedules" feature becomes available after the backend update. Try again once the deploy is complete.
summary: Clock-in tolerance ±{{toleranceIn}}min · clock-out ±{{toleranceOut}}min · break {{breakMin}}–{{breakMax}}min · lunch break {{lunchMin}}–{{lunchMax}}min
empty: No schedules configured yet. Create the first one to start assigning it to employees.

form.name: Name
form.penaltiesHint: Minutes deducted from worked time when the tolerance is exceeded.
form.countExtraordinary: Count overtime hours in this schedule
form.extraordinaryHint: Overtime beyond the expected schedule is counted in whole blocks: an incomplete block is not counted. E.g. expected clock-out 18:00, actual clock-out 18:28 → with 30-min blocks no overtime, with 15-min blocks it counts 15 min.
form.flexibleHint: In flextime the target is total worked hours: clock-in and clock-out may shift within the windows below without raising anomalies, and overtime/shortfall are computed on worked duration. Set the flexibility minutes before and after the expected times.
form.autoLunchHint: Fixed lunch amount, auto-deducted from presence and taken whenever without splitting the slot. Available only when the day has a single slot.
form.weekHint: Add multiple slots on the same day for split shifts (e.g. 09:00–13:00 + 14:00–18:00).
